short_description: AI-powered Policy Compliance Analyst for identifying and mitigating regulatory risks
domain_summary: {'description': 'The Policy Compliance Analyst is designed to assist organizations in identifying and mitigating regulatory risks by analyzing policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements.', 'keywords': ['Policy Compliance', 'Regulatory Risk', 'Risk Management']}
user_persona: Risk Management Specialist: A professional responsible for identifying and mitigating regulatory risks within an organization.
architecture_notes: The architecture is designed to be scalable, secure, and maintainable.
backend_modules: Policy Parser: Module responsible for parsing policies and procedures
Regulatory Database: Module responsible for storing and retrieving regulatory requirements
Risk Assessment Engine: Module responsible for assessing regulatory risks
frontend_features: Policy Upload: Feature allowing users to upload policies and procedures
Regulatory Requirements Display: Feature displaying regulatory requirements
Risk Assessment Results: Feature displaying risk assessment results
data_sources: Policy Database: Database storing policies and procedures
Regulatory Database: Database storing regulatory requirements
testing_strategy: The testing strategy involves unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing.
starter_questions: {'question': 'What are the regulatory requirements for our organization?', 'answer': 'The regulatory requirements can be found in the Regulatory Database module.'}
{'question': 'How do I upload a policy?', 'answer': 'You can upload a policy using the Policy Upload feature on the frontend.'}
workflow_steps: Upload Policy: User uploads a policy and procedure
Assess Regulatory Risks: Risk Assessment Engine assesses regulatory risks
Display Results: Risk Assessment Results feature displays risk assessment results
business_rules: Risk Assessment Engine assesses regulatory risks when a policy is uploaded
Risk Assessment Results feature displays risk assessment results when regulatory risks are identified

sample_documents.content: This is an example policy document.
This is an example of regulatory requirements.

tool_catalog.name: FastAPI
tool_catalog.description: A modern, fast (high-performance), web framework for building APIs with Python 3.7+ based on standard Python type hints.

tool_catalog.name: React
tool_catalog.description: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces.

tool_catalog.name: Docker
tool_catalog.description: A containerization platform for building, shipping, and running distributed applications.

agent_plan.name: Architecture Agent
agent_plan.role: Define app boundaries, data flow, runtime stack, and integration points.
outputs: The architecture is designed to be scalable, secure, and maintainable.

agent_plan.name: Backend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design FastAPI modules, service contracts, validation, and error handling.
outputs: Policy Parser: Module responsible for parsing policies and procedures
Regulatory Database: Module responsible for storing and retrieving regulatory requirements
Risk Assessment Engine: Module responsible for assessing regulatory risks

agent_plan.name: Frontend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design React screens, state flow, controls, and user feedback states.
outputs: Policy Upload: Feature allowing users to upload policies and procedures
Regulatory Requirements Display: Feature displaying regulatory requirements
Risk Assessment Results: Feature displaying risk assessment results

agent_plan.name: Database Agent
agent_plan.role: Design persistence models, sample data, indexes, and audit records.

agent_plan.name: Testing Agent
agent_plan.role: Define contract tests, smoke tests, and generated project validation.
outputs: The testing strategy involves unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing.

agent_plan.name: DevOps Agent
agent_plan.role: Define environment variables, Docker workflow, and repository packaging.

agent_plan.name: Reviewer Agent
agent_plan.role: Review the generated plan for completeness, security, and portfolio quality.
outputs: Upload Policy: User uploads a policy and procedure
Assess Regulatory Risks: Risk Assessment Engine assesses regulatory risks
Display Results: Risk Assessment Results feature displays risk assessment results
